The '''Comm Center''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Communications relay/Legends|communications relay]] networking center that was surrounded by 4 [[communications satellite]]s, which were protected by small minefields around them. Imperial defector [[Zaletta]] used the Comm Center in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] to divert messages and inform the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] of Imperial activity.

The Comm Center was traced by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] intent on discovering the identity of their mysterious informer. After the Comm Center was located, forces of [[A-wing]]s including [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] went to the area and inspect it after clearing it of its minefield.

The [[Python (Assassin-class)|''Python'']] was called in to download the Center's logs. During the boarding operation, the ''Python'' was threatened by [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] coming from [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] [[Halberd (escort carrier)|''Halberd'']] which arrived to the area to prevent the operation.

''Python'' was successfully defended from the TIE bombers and the Rebel forces returned to their base.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
